questions: Does loadConfig resolve multi-token config entries correctly?
Does hlx token add validate with server and store the entry?
Is hlx org list local-only with no server calls?
Does hlx org switch work locally for hxi_ tokens?
Do env-var overrides still work for Helix agent runs?
Are token values masked in output?

answers.answer: Yes. loadConfig reads orgs array, finds entry matching currentOrg pointer, returns compatible HxConfig. Single-org convenience: if only one entry and no currentOrg, uses that entry.
evidence: src/lib/config.ts L43-82: loadConfig multi-token resolution logic

answers.answer: Yes. cmdTokenAdd validates token format (hxi_ prefix), calls /api/auth/me with temp config, extracts org from response, stores via addOrgEntry. Invalid tokens fail without writing config.
evidence: Runtime test: token add succeeded and stored entry in config.json; invalid token test failed correctly

answers.answer: Yes. cmdOrgList reads from getOrgEntries() and loadRawConfig() only. No hxFetch call. No config parameter needed.
evidence: src/org/list.ts: no imports from http.ts, no hxFetch calls

answers.answer: Yes. For hxi_ tokens, cmdOrgSwitch resolves by orgId, alias, then case-insensitive orgName from local entries. Calls setCurrentOrg to update config. No server call.
evidence: Runtime test: switch to unconfigured org failed with clear message listing configured orgs

answers.answer: Yes. loadConfig env-var path (L44-49) returns immediately with apiKey+url from env vars, completely bypassing multi-token config. Verified with HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN + HELIX_INSPECT_BASE_URL running hlx inspect repos.
evidence: Runtime test: env-var inspect repos returned repository list successfully

answers.answer: Yes. maskToken returns hxi_<first8>... for tokens longer than prefix+8 chars. Used in token add output and error messages.
evidence: Runtime test: output showed 'hxi_dd20ed70...' not full token

statement: CLI redesigned for multi-token org-scoped config. New hlx token add command validates with server and stores org/token pairs. hlx org list is local-only. hlx org switch resolves from local entries for hxi_ tokens. Env-var override path unchanged. Token values masked in output. loadConfig returns compatible HxConfig from multi-token config. Typecheck and build pass.
